notes: Tyrer-Cuzick-style approximation based on Tyrer, Duffy & Cuzick 2004 and subsequent updates. This is not the official IBIS Breast Cancer Risk Evaluator. CanRisk is the NICE-recommended alternative when multi-gene or polygenic-risk-score information is available — export the pedigree as ##CanRisk 2.0 and upload it at canrisk.org.
